notableEvents.label: Trevor Story — 1 error-assisted run
notableEvents.detail: Top 4 · 1–1 · Trevor Story grounds into a force out, shortstop Masyn Winn to second baseman JJ Wetherholt. Masataka Yoshida scores. Wilyer Abreu out at 2nd. Trevor Story advances to 2nd, on a throwing error by second baseman JJ Wetherholt.
